lead.full_text: Mark Twain once said, 'Truth is more of a stranger than fiction.' Today, these words are a perfect description of what we often hear from big government, big financial institutions and the big medical establishment. Usually, they hold the aces so they feel they can feed the general public all the lies, half-truths and self-serving explanations they desire... all to separate you from your money, your health and your independence.

fssit_candidates.statement: The Fat Cats in power know it's not a level playing field. Usually, they hold the aces so they feel they can feed the general public all the lies, half-truths and self-serving explanations they desire... all to separate you from your money, your health and your independence.
Throughout history, people have made fortunes and turned around big losses by investing contrary to the masses or popular opinion and by investing based on the real trends in the market.

The real cause of heart disease is a nutritional deficiency. Cardiologists don't know and cannot be told that heart disease is nothing more than an unrecognized form of malnutrition or a specialized form of starvation.

The major hidden cause of high cholesterol: Most doctors and most people think high cholesterol is caused by too much fat. Not true! Fat is not the real culprit... sugar is! One of the main reasons we have so many people in America with high cholesterol is we have an addiction to sugar.
Americans are addicted to sugar - we eat 32 teaspoons a day - and that's bad news for our cholesterol levels! Too much sugar reduces your immunity 92 percent!

The truth is the flu shot is based on the myth of the germ theory of disease. This states that we catch something from germs in the air or germs of other people. It's just not so! The truth is the flu and any infection is the body's response to overacidity!

98 percent of vitamins are not what they claim to be. For a vitamin to be nutritional, therapeutic and permanent, it must be organic or natural. This simply means that it must come directly from the earth. A synthetic vitamin is an isolated factor or a drug made by man.
